sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41854" key="e)porofo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐποροφόω</orth>, <sense id="n41854.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to put on as a roof</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cover,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸν οὐρανόν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
